items.line_en: Doctor's office, Kathy speaking. How can I help you?

coach.say: Doctor's office, Kathy speaking. How can I help you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Doctor's office, / Kathy speaking. / How can I help you?

items.line_en: This is Ruth Perez. I'd like to make an appointment with Dr. Smith.

coach.say: This is Ruth Perez. I'd like to make an appointment with Dr. Smith.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is Ruth Perez. / I'd like to make an appointment with Dr. / Smith.

items.line_en: Okay. Why do you need to see the doctor?

coach.say: Okay. Why do you need to see the doctor?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. / Why do you need to see the doctor?

items.line_en: I have a sore throat. It's all red and bumpy.

coach.say: I have a sore throat. It's all red and bumpy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have a sore throat. / It's all red and bumpy.

items.line_en: How long have you had your symptoms?

coach.say: How long have you had your symptoms?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How long have you had your symptoms?

items.line_en: It's been bothering me for about three days.

coach.say: It's been bothering me for about three days.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's been bothering me for about three days.

items.line_en: Can you come in tomorrow at noon?

coach.say: Can you come in tomorrow at noon?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can you come in tomorrow at noon?

items.line_en: Thank you for taking me so soon.

coach.say: Thank you for taking me so soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you for taking me so / soon.

items.line_en: No problem. We'll see you tomorrow at 12 o'clock, Ms. Perez.

coach.say: No problem. We'll see you tomorrow at 12 o'clock, Ms. Perez.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No problem. / We'll see you tomorrow at 12 o'clock, / Ms. / Perez.
